graded.name: DLF Ltd
graded.thesis: Realty sector demonstrating significant strength with DLF leading the gains. Continued positive sentiment in real estate development and urban housing.

graded.name: NTPC Ltd
graded.thesis: Energy sector outperformance driven by increasing power demand and government's focus on infrastructure development, making NTPC a key beneficiary.

graded.name: Shree Cement Ltd
graded.thesis: Cement sector exhibiting strong momentum, fueled by sustained construction activities and infrastructure spending, positioning Shree Cement for continued growth.

graded.name: Infosys Ltd
